title: Research: valuable Obsidian AI companion features
description: 调研 Obsidian Copilot、Smart Connections、Text Generator、Cursor/Continue 类工具在 Obsidian 工作流里的高价值功能。输出必须区分机制层和策略层：机制层是本插件应保持干净的桥接、诊断、上下文生命周期；策略层是 agent workflow、hooks、preset、RAG、上下文选择策略。不要直接要求实现，先给可验证来源和可分解候选。
notes: Verified sources: Copilot docs https://www.obsidiancopilot.com/en/docs ; Copilot Vault QA https://www.obsidiancopilot.com/docs/vault-qa ; Copilot Custom Prompts https://www.obsidiancopilot.com/docs/custom-prompts ; Obsidian plugin listing https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/copilot ; Smart Connections site https://smartconnections.app/smart-connections/ ; Smart Plugins overview https://smartconnections.app/ ; QuickAdd docs https://quickadd.obsidian.guide/ ; QuickAdd getting started https://quickadd.obsidian.guide/docs/ . Candidate order: 1) explicit context picker for current note, open notes, selection, backlinks, note/folder/tag-style scopes, URL; 2) context diagnostics/provenance panel; 3) reusable context packs as explicit ContextItemRef sets; 4) patch/apply-edit preview with review before writing; 5) workflow commands/presets. Mechanism layer should own visible context item lifecycle, picker primitives, removable provenance, diagnostics, patch preview/apply primitives. Strategy layer should own RAG, semantic ranking, automatic context selection, prompt templates, project rules, provider/model routing, hooks, MCP/tool policy, and agent workflow prompts. Risk: do not put RAG or automatic context policy into core; core should consume explicit, removable, diagnosable context items.
close_reason: External feature research completed and summarized in bead notes

title: Product: Obsidian-native OpenCode discussion substrate
description:
Product epic for the direction captured in docs/explorations/obsidian-opencode-product-positioning.md.

The plugin value comes from OpenCode discussion operating over the user's Obsidian knowledge structure with visible context, vault evidence, safe navigation, graph-derived candidates, and runtime diagnostics. Web UI remains an entry point, not the center of the product.

Success criteria:
- Context provenance and safe vault navigation are visible before any write action.
- GraphIndex provides the first-order Obsidian metadata facts consumed by navigation, Bar, diagnostics, and GraphRAG.
- GraphRAG derived indexes can suggest evidence-backed candidates without writing to vault or auto-injecting context.
- OpenCode event/question/permission/tui work consumes the existing current session and context/diagnostics surfaces.
- TUI/attach coexistence is treated as a first-class workflow; the plugin adds Obsidian-native evidence and control rather than trying to replace terminal interaction.

Reference docs:
- docs/explorations/obsidian-opencode-product-positioning.md
- docs/explorations/graphrag-known-to-unknown.md

title: Surface: show GraphRAG candidates as read-only evidence
description:
Extend the Obsidian-native context control surface to show GraphRAG candidates as read-only evidence. This connects the product surface to GraphRAG without turning candidates into automatic actions.

Display requirements:
- Separate current session context from candidate content.
- Show candidate path, reason fields, graph status, evidence path samples, and freshness.
- Show unresolved/partial/failed states plainly.
- Provide explicit actions only for user-confirmed add-to-context or navigation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Candidate rows cannot be mistaken for active context.
- UI can render stale/partial/failed derived index states.
- Copy diagnostics includes candidate evidence fields and omits note full text.
- Navigation uses the same safe navigator/GraphIndex path as context rows.
- No automatic vault writes or automatic context injection.
acceptance_criteria:
- Candidate capsules are visually distinct from active session context but use the same capsule language.
- Candidate rows default to included and can be toggled excluded without mutating vault content or OpenCode session context.
- Single click navigates to evidence through ContextItemNavigator or GraphIndex-backed navigation.
- Broken-link candidates navigate to source occurrence, not missing target.
- Candidate diagnostics include graph evidence fields and omit note full text.
- No automatic vault writes and no automatic context injection.
notes: Design update 2026-06-14: GraphRAG candidates should reuse the capsule surface described in docs/plans/context-control-surface.md. Candidates default to included, can be toggled excluded by double click or the right-side state icon, and do not become active session context until an explicit add/send action. Single click navigates to the evidence occurrence through the same safe navigator/GraphIndex path. Broken-link candidates navigate to the source Markdown occurrence where the bad reference is written.

title: Bridge: expose OpenCode events as read-only session state
description:
Design and implement the first read-only OpenCode event bridge for the Obsidian product surface. This is the entry point for future event/question/permission/tui work, but the first phase only observes and displays state.

Scope:
- Consume the existing CurrentContextSession entry point for session identity.
- Decide whether events come through proxy, server API, or another stable OpenCode surface after checking local OpenCode contracts.
- Display event stream health and latest relevant session events in diagnostics/surface.
- Do not auto-answer permission/question prompts in this task.

Acceptance Criteria:
- No module re-parses iframe URLs to find the current session.
- Event bridge has a single owner and clear teardown on plugin unload.
- UI/diagnostics can show connected, disconnected, unsupported, and failed states.
- Tests or harness fixture cover session missing, stream unavailable, and event payload handling.
- Future permission/question/tui strategy tasks can consume this bridge without changing ContextManager responsibilities.
close_reason: Implemented read-only OpenCode event bridge: OpenCodeBridge owns bridge lifecycle, OpenCodeEventSource consumes GET /api/event diagnostics through CurrentContextSession, runtime status exposes connected/disconnected/failed/unsupported and current-session event facts. Renamed Web UI transport class to OpenCodeWebUiProxy so broad bridge/proxy language no longer collides with iframe HTTP proxy implementation. Verified with bun run check and bun run dev:bridge.

title: Discussion provenance for AI-to-note refinement
description:
Provide the evidence layer needed to refine OpenCode discussions into Obsidian notes without creating AI dumps. This task does not generate or write final notes; it makes the provenance of a discussion reviewable.

Product source: docs/explorations/obsidian-opencode-product-positioning.md section AI 对话提炼.

Scope:
- Identify which current session context items supported a discussion.
- Distinguish vault-backed evidence from model-only claims when possible.
- Copy a compact discussion provenance report: context item ids, source paths, ranges, text lengths, graph evidence, and user-confirmed actions.
- Prepare later explicit export/write tasks without adding automatic note creation.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Report omits note full text and full conversation text by default.
- Restored context with uncertain source is displayed as uncertain, not silently trusted.
- Report links back to existing vault sources through safe navigation evidence.
- No new notes are created and no links are modified in this task.
- Tests cover vault-backed context, restored uncertain context, and model-only discussion with no vault evidence.

title: Define TUI and plugin coexistence contract
description:
Document and test the intended coexistence between terminal OpenCode TUI workflows and the Obsidian plugin. The plugin should add Obsidian-native evidence/control while allowing the user to keep terminal interaction as the main conversation surface.

Scope:
- Clarify path mode, custom command mode, and attach/serve workflows.
- Describe how a shared OpenCode server/session should be discovered or selected.
- Document the boundary: the plugin owns Obsidian context/provenance/graph/diagnostics; TUI can remain the primary text interaction.
- Identify which parts require upstream-stable OpenCode contracts and which can be user custom command configuration.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Docs explain the recommended local workflow without depending on the user's patched OpenCode branch as a default.
- Existing server attach/serve behavior is described with observable health/session checks.
- The contract names which module owns session resolution and which module owns server lifecycle.
- A future implementation bead can be created from this doc if attach support needs code changes.
- No code changes are required by this bead unless documentation commands need correction.
close_reason: Documented TUI/plugin coexistence contract and created follow-up for optional shared server/session selection

Product positioning and GraphRAG exploration docs are linked, and future work order mirrors safe navigation, context provenance/control, GraphIndex, GraphRAG derived layer, and OpenCode event bridge. bun run format:check and br lint --json pass.

title: Decide OpenCode event source contract
description:
Before implementing a read-only OpenCode event bridge, decide which stable OpenCode surface provides events and how unsupported states are represented.

Scope:
- Inspect local OpenCode contracts/source before choosing proxy, server API, SSE, or unsupported.
- Document event payload shape, session identity binding, lifecycle, teardown, and failure states.
- Define unsupported/fallback behavior without inventing a private protocol.
- Keep permission/question/tui auto-actions out of this task.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Decision record names the event source and the upstream contract or says unsupported with evidence.
- Contract consumes CurrentContextSession for session identity; no iframe URL reparsing.
- Connected, disconnected, unsupported, failed states are defined for UI/diagnostics.
- Follow-up implementation task can be written without re-researching event source.
- No code implementation required unless a fixture is needed to verify the contract shape.

title: Investigate Obsidian rendering instability from OpenCode transparent webview
description:
User reports intermittent Obsidian rendering corruption after enabling the plugin: full-window dark overlay, file tree ghosting, and severe cases that feel like freeze. Treat as a compositor/rendering stability bug, not only theme color mismatch.

Initial evidence: screenshots show the issue affects Obsidian chrome/editor/file tree outside the OpenCode iframe, so investigation must cover host CSS, iframe transparency, proxy-injected background layers, hidden iframe probe, and runtime diagnostics.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Use Obsidian with a translucent theme or background image setup.
2. Open the OpenCode pane in Obsidian appearance mode.
3. Observe intermittent full-window dark overlay, file tree ghosting, stale text layers, or severe repaint and freeze behavior.
4. Run bun run dev:theme -- --vault ~/Note/计算机 --full while the old bundle is loaded. Diagnostics show host and iframe background layers painting the same editor background image and a hidden probe iframe.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Capture which runtime and style layers are active in Obsidian appearance mode: host pane background, iframe transparency, proxy body background, background image opacity and filter, and hidden probe iframe.
- Identify whether duplicated large transparent or filtered background layers can affect the host window compositor.
- Reduce the risky layer stack at the source without breaking Obsidian or opencode appearance modes.
- Add tests or harness checks that prevent multiple large background-image or filter layers from being active simultaneously in Obsidian appearance mode.
- Run bun run check and bun run dev:theme:fixture -- --full.
- Keep live Obsidian validation open until the user confirms the obvious ghosting or black overlay is gone.
notes: Live validation passed after Obsidian restart. Current runtime dev:theme reports ok=true against ~/Note/计算机. Proxy HTML has no deprecated compositor snippets. OpenCode iframe document roots remain transparent and do not paint a background layer. Host .opencode-appearance-obsidian::before follows the Obsidian editor background image https://i.redd.it/epv89y08yrkf1.jpeg with opacity 0.3. This is the intended host-only background model: one parent pane layer, no proxy body::before, no hidden probe iframe, no copied --opencode-obsidian-editor-background-* theme payload.
close_reason: Closed after main contains the Obsidian appearance/theme diagnostics contract work (56bb98d) and environment-bound default test cleanup (4c6718c). User has since fixed the remaining theme state manually and asked to close this rendering-instability task. This closes the theme/rendering investigation bead only; GraphRAG remains a separate unresolved product/research area.

title: 新建 ContextSyncer：监听 registry 事件同步到 opencode
description:
新建 src/context/ContextSyncer.ts。监听 ContextRegistry 事件，调用 OpenCodeClient 同步上下文到 opencode 服务器。

来自 spec: docs/plans/context-management.md#CM-04

## 职责
- 构造函数接收 (registry, client, getSessionId)
- on('context:added') → client.addContextMessage() → 回填 messageId/partId
- on('context:removed') → client.ignorePart()；messageId 为 undefined 时跳过
- restoreFromServer() → client.listSessionMessages() → registry.restoreItems()
- start() / stop() 管理事件绑定生命周期

## 最小接口约束
- start() 幂等：重复调用不重复绑定
- stop() 幂等：重复调用不报错；解绑后不再消费事件
- 事件处理串行（同步 EventEmitter callback，无并发）
- 回填仅允许写 messageId/partId 两个字段
- remove-before-ack：messageId 为 undefined → 跳过 ignorePart（不补发）
- API 失败时 console.error，不回填 messageId
- getSessionId 来源冻结为 OpenCodeClient.resolveSessionId() + 插件 cachedIframeUrl

## Acceptance Criteria
- bun run build 零错误
- added 后 messageId 被正确回填
- removed 前 messageId 为 undefined → Syncer 跳过 ignorePart
- stop() 后不再响应事件
- start() 重复调用不重复绑定
acceptance_criteria: build clean; messageId backfilled after added; remove-before-ack skip verified; stop() stops consuming; start() idempotent
close_reason: spec 重写为最简桥接架构，旧 beads 作废

title: Safe context source navigation without file creation
description:
Fix the known production risk first: clicking a context source must never create a new Obsidian file. This task is the minimal SafeContextNavigator slice and must not wait for the full GraphIndex query API.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Construct a ContextItem whose sourceFile is a missing vault path, folder path, URL, or synthetic workspace source.
2. Click the context source row/action in the current status bar or context surface.
3. Observe that the current implementation can route through workspace.openLinkText and may create a new Markdown file or ambiguous Obsidian navigation side effect.

## Scope
- Provide the single production entry point for opening ContextItem sources.
- Input only uses current ContextItem fields: sourceFile, startLine, endLine, label, type.
- Resolve only enough to prevent creation: existing TFile, TFolder, missing path, URL, synthetic workspace source, optional heading/block if an existing resolver is available.
- Open only existing vault files.
- Return explicit unresolved reasons for non-openable sources.

## Boundary
- This task may consume Obsidian stable APIs directly for the minimal resolver slice.
- A later task will switch this navigator to the full GraphIndex query API once GraphIndex exists.
- Do not build a second long-lived graph resolver. Keep this slice narrow and replaceable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Context source opening no longer calls workspace.openLinkText in production code.
- Existing TFile opens safely, optionally at startLine when available.
- Missing path, folder path, URL, workspace synthetic source, and unresolved subpath do not create files and return visible unresolved reasons.
- Focused tests cover real file, line number, missing target, folder, URL, and synthetic workspace source.
- Diagnostics can report the unresolved reason without copying context text.
acceptance_criteria:
- Production context source opener has one entry point.
- No production context source opener uses workspace.openLinkText.
- Only existing vault files can be opened.
- Unresolved cases preserve evidence and never create files.
- Follow-up GraphIndex integration is tracked separately.
close_reason: Completed current slice: context source opening now uses ContextItemNavigator, only opens existing vault files, returns unresolved reasons, and focused tests cover file, line, missing, folder, URL, synthetic source, and subpath. Follow-up GraphIndex integration remains tracked by oc-htk.1.1.

title: Switch ContextItemNavigator resolution to GraphIndex query API
description:
After GraphIndex query APIs exist, switch ContextItemNavigator from the minimal Obsidian resolver slice to GraphIndex-backed evidence navigation.

## Scope
- Keep ContextItemNavigator as the only production context source opening entry point.
- Replace minimal direct Obsidian resolution with GraphIndex-backed linkpath/subpath and reference occurrence evidence.
- Legal references open the existing target file, heading, block, or footnote.
- Illegal references open the existing source Markdown occurrence where the bad reference is written.
- Preserve unresolved reasons from the minimal navigator.
- Do not broaden navigation into recommendation or context selection.

## Boundary
- The context surface only delegates navigation. It must not parse wikilinks, consume MetadataCache, or call workspace.openLinkText.
- Missing targets are never opened and never created. The source occurrence is the repair location when known.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Navigator consumes GraphIndex query API for file, subpath, and reference occurrence resolution.
- Existing focused tests from the minimal navigator still pass.
- Additional tests cover heading, block, and footnote target resolution through GraphIndex evidence.
- Additional tests cover unresolved target navigation to the source Markdown occurrence.
- If source occurrence is unavailable, navigation returns an explicit unresolved reason and does not open the missing target.
- No production context source opener calls workspace.openLinkText.
- No second resolver remains in context surface code.
acceptance_criteria:
- Navigator consumes GraphIndex query API for file, subpath, and reference occurrence resolution.
- Existing focused tests from the minimal navigator still pass.
- Additional tests cover heading, block, and footnote target resolution through GraphIndex evidence.
- Additional tests cover unresolved target navigation to the source Markdown occurrence.
- If source occurrence is unavailable, navigation returns an explicit unresolved reason and does not open the missing target.

- No second resolver remains in context surface code.

title: Evolve context bar into Obsidian-native context control surface
description:
把 ContextStatusBar 从轻量列表改成 Obsidian 原生 Context Control Surface。它是产品面，不只是状态提示。proxy 是后端桥接；bar/surface 是用户看见和控制当前 OpenCode session context 的 Obsidian 原生入口。

第一阶段形态：左侧 status bar entry 显示当前 session context 状态；点击打开 popover 或小窗，展示已进入当前 session 的 context、来源、类型、行号、provenance 状态、失败状态，并提供明确控制动作。控制动作可以包括跳回来源、从当前 session context 移除、复制 diagnostics、添加当前选区/当前笔记。移除必须表达为“从当前 session 上下文移除”，不能暗示删除 vault 文件或撤回历史回答；不能做成容易误触的角落小叉。

架构边界：surface 只消费 ContextManager/CurrentContextSession/ContextItemNavigator 等稳定入口，不解析 iframe URL，不直接操作 OpenCode API，不自己维护 context 生命周期，不复制 Obsidian link graph。后续 permission/question/event/tui/hooks 控制可以接入这个 surface，但必须通过独立策略入口暴露状态和动作。

## Acceptance Criteria
- status bar entry 靠左显示当前 session context 状态，并能打开 popover 或小窗。
- surface 区分“已进入当前 session 的 context”和“候选内容”。
- 已进入 context 的条目显示来源、类型、行号、textLength、createdAt、provenance/resolution 状态。
- row/action 调 ContextItemNavigator 或等价稳定入口，测试 resolved 和 unresolved reason。
- 移除动作是显式控制，不是角落小叉；失败时保留条目并显示失败原因。
- diagnostics 仍不复制完整 text。
- surface 不直接调用 workspace.openLinkText，不直接调 OpenCode API，不监听 Obsidian graph。
- 真实 Obsidian 验收：用户能从 bar 看出当前 session 附带了哪些 context，Workspace context、missing path、folder path 点击后不创建文件。
acceptance_criteria:
- status bar entry shows current context count and opens a compact capsule popover.
- default active context capsules show title and source only.
- healthy audit fields do not render in default rows; diagnostics still include structured fields without note text.
- abnormal state renders as a compact warning accent and details are available on selection/expand.
- single click delegates evidence navigation to ContextItemNavigator or a GraphIndex-backed equivalent.
- double click and right-side state icon toggle candidate inclusion for candidate rows.
- active context removal remains an explicit current-session ignore/remove action.
- empty candidate, hooks, and diagnostics sections are not rendered.
- ContextStatusBar does not parse links, consume MetadataCache, call OpenCode APIs, maintain graph state, or call workspace.openLinkText.
- real Obsidian validation confirms no missing target click creates a file.
notes: Design update 2026-06-14: docs/plans/context-control-surface.md is now the source for this surface. ContextStatusBar should render compact Obsidian-native capsules, not a debug table. Default capsules show title and source only; healthy audit fields such as known/resolved/chars/time stay in details or diagnostics. Single click delegates evidence navigation. Double click and the right-side state icon toggle candidate inclusion when the row is a candidate. Active session context uses an explicit session-scoped remove/ignore action. Empty candidate/hooks/diagnostics sections should not render. StatusBar must not parse wikilinks, consume MetadataCache, call OpenCode APIs, maintain GraphIndex, or call workspace.openLinkText.
close_reason: ContextStatusBar now renders compact context capsules with title/source defaults, hides healthy audit fields from default rows, omits empty candidate placeholders, keeps diagnostics redacted, delegates navigation through ContextItemNavigator, and keeps explicit session-scoped removal.

title: Index Obsidian link graph as a mechanism substrate
description:
第一阶段只做 Obsidian link graph 的机制索引。它是 bar/surface 的基础设施之一，角色类似 proxy：proxy 负责 HTTP/Web UI 桥接，graph index 负责 vault link facts 的只读结构化视图。

这一层不决定怎么用图，不做推荐、排序策略、自动 context 注入或多跳扩张。它只回答事实问题：vault 中有哪些节点、哪些 resolved edges、哪些 unresolved references、引用出现在源文件什么位置、某个 linkpath 能否落到 TFile、某个 subpath 能否落到 heading/block/footnote、metadata 当前是否足够新鲜可用。

## Data Model Direction
- GraphNode: vault path、basename/title、folder segments、exists、metadata status、headings、blocks、outDegree、inDegree、unresolvedCount。
- GraphReference: sourcePath、raw link/original、linkpath、displayText、kind(link/embed/frontmatter later if needed)、source position、resolved target path、subpath、subpath kind、resolution status。
- GraphEdge: sourcePath、targetPath、count、references[]、kind summary、subpath summary。
- GraphSnapshot: nodesByPath、outgoingBySource、incomingByTarget、unresolvedBySource、unresolvedByLinkpath、headingsByPath、blocksByPath、stats、version。

## Maintenance Direction
- 唯一真相源是 Obsidian metadata cache 和 vault file list。
- 启动/布局就绪后从 vault.getMarkdownFiles()、metadataCache.getFileCache(file)、metadataCache.resolvedLinks、metadataCache.unresolvedLinks 构建内存 snapshot。
- metadataCache.changed(file, data, cache) 重新索引单文件引用、heading、block。
- metadataCache.resolve(file) 刷新 resolved/unresolved edge 聚合。
- metadataCache.deleted 与 vault delete 移除节点和边。
- vault rename 触发路径重映射或局部重建；不能依赖 changed 事件，因为 Obsidian API 明说 rename 不触发 metadata changed。
- 不落盘，不维护持久化图谱缓存；派生结构必须可从 Obsidian metadata cache 重建。

## Query Sweet Spots
- 文件级：getNode、getOutgoing、getIncoming、getReferencesBetween、getUnresolvedFrom。
- 引用级：resolveLinkpath、resolveSubpath、getReferenceAt/near line、getBrokenReferences。
- 结构审计级：getOrphans、getStats、topByInDegree/topByOutDegree、getNeighborhood(path, depth <= 3)、getCrossRootCoverage。
- 精确引用级：headings/blocks index 支持 heading/block 跳转和断链定位。

## Success Criteria
- oc-htk.4.1、oc-htk.4.2、oc-htk.4.3、oc-htk.4.4 全部完成。
- GraphIndex 有冻结的数据结构、维护模型、查询 API、diagnostics/harness。
- 查询 API 覆盖知识挖掘甜区：入链、出链、断链、孤岛、入度前 N、≤3 跳邻域、跨顶层目录覆盖、heading/block 精确引用。
- GraphIndex 不接入 context injection、候选推荐、排序策略、UI 自动选择或多跳扩张。
- GraphIndex 不落盘；派生结构可从 Obsidian metadata cache 重建。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 子任务分别冻结数据结构、维护机制、查询 API、diagnostics/harness。
- 所有输入只来自本地 obsidian.d.ts 可证 API：Vault.getMarkdownFiles、MetadataCache.getFileCache、resolvedLinks、unresolvedLinks、getFirstLinkpathDest、resolveSubpath、CachedMetadata links/embeds/headings/blocks、CacheItem.position、vault rename/delete/create、metadata changed/resolve/deleted。
- graph snapshot 至少表达 resolved edges、unresolved references、reference positions、linkpath resolution、subpath resolution、metadata freshness/availability。
- 不新增 PageRank、中心性、社群发现、embedding、语义搜索。
- 文档写清该层只是机制索引，策略层后置。
acceptance_criteria:
- 子任务分别冻结数据结构、维护机制、查询 API、diagnostics/harness。
- 所有输入只来自本地 obsidian.d.ts 可证 API：Vault.getMarkdownFiles、MetadataCache.getFileCache、resolvedLinks、unresolvedLinks、getFirstLinkpathDest、resolveSubpath、CachedMetadata links/embeds/headings/blocks、CacheItem.position、vault rename/delete/create、metadata changed/resolve/deleted。
- graph snapshot 至少表达 resolved edges、unresolved references、reference positions、linkpath resolution、subpath resolution、metadata freshness/availability。
- 查询 API 覆盖知识挖掘甜区：入链、出链、断链、孤岛、入度前 N、≤3 跳邻域、跨顶层目录覆盖、heading/block 精确引用。
- 不把 graph index 接入 context injection、候选推荐、排序策略、UI 自动选择或多跳扩张。

title: Define GraphIndex data model and invariants
description:
Freeze the Obsidian graph index data model. The goal is for maintenance, query, bar/surface, and diagnostics to consume one graph snapshot type.

Required Types:
- GraphNode: path, basename/title, folderSegments, exists, metadataStatus, headings, blocks, inDegree, outDegree, unresolvedCount.
- GraphReference: sourcePath, raw/original, linkpath, displayText, kind, position, targetPath, subpath, subpathKind, resolution.
- GraphEdge: sourcePath, targetPath, count, references, kindSummary, subpathSummary.
- GraphSnapshot: nodesByPath, outgoingBySource, incomingByTarget, unresolvedBySource, unresolvedByLinkpath, headingsByPath, blocksByPath, stats, version.

Invariants:
- Graph paths use vault-relative Obsidian TFile.path values.
- Diagnostics and cache keys may separately carry vault identity/root/path; GraphNode.path itself is not an absolute filesystem path.
- line/column preserve Obsidian CacheItem.position 0-based values; UI converts for human display.
- resolved edge must trace back to at least one GraphReference.
- unresolved reference keeps raw linkpath and position; it does not create a virtual TFile.
- GraphSnapshot is a derived read model, not a persistent truth source.

Acceptance Criteria:
- New graph type definition or spec expresses files, references, edges, headings, blocks, unresolved references, and snapshot stats.
- Types do not import OpenCodeClient, ContextManager, ContextStatusBar, or proxy.
- Tests or type tests freeze path, position, resolution status, and degree count minimum shapes.
- Docs clearly distinguish vault-relative TFile.path from diagnostics/cache vault identity/root.
- Docs state the 0-based position and UI 1-based display boundary.
acceptance_criteria:
- GraphNode.path/sourcePath/targetPath use vault-relative TFile.path values.
- Vault identity/root is represented separately when needed for diagnostics/cache.
- No absolute filesystem path is required inside graph node identity.
- 0-based Obsidian positions and UI 1-based display boundary are documented.
- Minimum type shape is test-covered.
close_reason: GraphIndex data model and invariants implemented in src/graph/GraphIndex.ts with focused tests and docs

title: Maintain GraphIndex from Obsidian metadata events
description:
实现 graph snapshot 的维护模型。GraphIndex 是内存 read model，唯一真相源是 Obsidian Vault + MetadataCache。

## Maintenance Contract
- bootstrap: workspace/layout ready 后读取 vault.getMarkdownFiles()，对每个 TFile 读 metadataCache.getFileCache(file)，再合并 metadataCache.resolvedLinks/unresolvedLinks。
- changed(file, data, cache): 重新索引单文件 references、headings、blocks，并更新该 source 的 outgoing/unresolved。
- resolve(file): 刷新 resolvedLinks/unresolvedLinks 聚合，保证 linkpath -> target 的状态和 Obsidian 一致。
- metadata deleted(file, prevCache) 与 vault delete(file): 移除节点、入边、出边、unresolved references。
- vault rename(file, oldPath): 重映射 path 或触发局部重建；不能等待 metadata changed。
- create(file): markdown 文件进入 nodes，metadata 不可用时标记 pending。
- 批量事件用 debounce/coalesce，避免每个 metadata event 重建全图。

## Acceptance Criteria
- GraphIndex 可以从 mock Vault/MetadataCache 构建完整 snapshot。
- changed/resolve/delete/rename/create 都有 focused tests。
- rename 测试证明不依赖 metadata changed。
- metadata missing 时节点保留 pending/unavailable 状态，不吞掉文件。
- 不落盘，不读取正文全文，不维护持久 cache。
- GraphIndex 不 import ContextManager、ContextStatusBar、OpenCodeClient 或 proxy。
close_reason: GraphIndex bootstrap/change/resolve/delete/rename/create maintenance paths are implemented and covered by focused tests

title: Expose GraphIndex query API for audit and navigation sweet spots
description:
设计并实现 GraphIndex 的查询 API。目标是承接多种未来诉求，但数据结构重点优化知识挖掘和比较研究的甜区查询。API 返回事实，不做推荐判断。

## Query Surface
- getNode(path)
- getOutgoing(path) / getIncoming(path)
- getReferencesBetween(sourcePath, targetPath)
- getUnresolvedFrom(sourcePath) / getUnresolvedByLinkpath(linkpath)
- resolveLinkpath(linkpath, sourcePath)
- resolveSubpath(targetPath, subpath)
- getHeadings(path) / getBlocks(path)
- getNeighborhood(path, { depth: 1 | 2 | 3, direction })
- getOrphans()
- getStats()
- topByInDegree(limit) / topByOutDegree(limit)
- getCrossRootCoverage(path or paths)

## Sweet Spots
- 直接入链/出链：支持当前笔记来路和辐射路径。
- 断链定位：支持 broken/unresolved reference 审查和修复入口。
- heading/block 精确引用：支持最小必要粒度跳转。
- 孤岛和断链率：支持 vault 结构健康检查。
- 入度前 N 和 ≤3 跳邻域：支持吸引子审计的候选种子和吸引盆观察。
- 跨顶层目录覆盖：支持理论/实践等跨域覆盖观察，但不做路由判断。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 查询 API 有 TypeScript 类型和 focused tests。
- API 只返回事实结构，不返回 recommendation、score、shouldAddToContext 等策略字段。
- ≤3 跳查询有深度上限，避免无边界遍历。
- topByInDegree/topByOutDegree 只按简单度数排序，不引入 PageRank/centrality。
- cross-root coverage 只基于 path segment 统计，不解释领域含义。
- ContextItemNavigator 后续可以消费 resolveLinkpath/resolveSubpath，不需要自建第二套 resolver。
close_reason: GraphIndex query API for links, unresolved, subpaths, neighborhood, degree, orphans, and root coverage is implemented and covered by focused tests

title: Add GraphIndex diagnostics and harness checks
description:
给 GraphIndex 增加可观测性和 harness 验收。目标是让后续 bar/surface 或 agent 调试时能看到 graph index 的健康状态，而不是要求用户打开 Obsidian 图谱截图。

## Diagnostics Surface
- nodeCount、edgeCount、referenceCount、unresolvedReferenceCount、orphanCount。
- metadataPendingCount、metadataUnavailableCount、lastIndexedAt、version。
- topInDegree/topOutDegree 摘要只作为结构事实。
- sample unresolved references 包含 sourcePath、linkpath、position。
- graph index 是否来自当前 vault、是否完成 bootstrap、最近一次 event 类型。

## Harness Direction
- dev/harness 命令能用 mock fixture 或真实 vault runtime status 输出 graph summary。
- fixture 覆盖 resolved link、unresolved link、heading subpath、block subpath、rename/delete。
- diagnostics 不输出笔记全文，只输出路径、计数、位置和少量样本。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 新增 graph diagnostics formatter 或 harness report。
- 测试验证 summary 不包含 note body/full text。
- harness 能区分 indexed、pending、metadata unavailable。
- 断链样本带 sourcePath、linkpath 和 0-based position。
- AGENTS.md 写清 graph diagnostics 是第一排查入口，Obsidian Graph View 截图只能作人工辅证。

title: GraphIndex: expose reference occurrence evidence for navigation
description:
GraphIndex must expose reference occurrence evidence so navigation and GraphRAG can consume the same Markdown facts. Broken links are maintenance evidence: the useful navigation target is the existing source Markdown occurrence where the bad reference is written, not the missing target.

Scope:
- Preserve sourcePath, raw/original link text, linkpath, display text when available, kind link/embed, source position, target path when resolved, target subpath, subpath kind, and resolution status.
- Expose queries for references by source path, unresolved references by linkpath, and source occurrence navigation data.
- Use Obsidian metadata cache facts: CachedMetadata.links, embeds, headings, blocks, CacheItem.position, parseLinktext, getFirstLinkpathDest, resolveSubpath, resolvedLinks, unresolvedLinks.
- Do not read note body and do not write vault files.

Acceptance Criteria:
- GraphReference or equivalent shape includes source occurrence position and target resolution status.
- Query API can return the source occurrence for a broken linkpath.
- Query API can distinguish missing target, unresolved heading, unresolved block, and unresolved footnote when facts are available.
- Tests cover resolved target, missing target, unresolved heading, unresolved block, and embed reference positions.
- The API is fact-only: no ranking, recommendation, shouldAddToContext, or context injection.
close_reason: GraphIndex now exposes reference occurrence evidence, source occurrence queries, subpath resolution reasons, and focused tests for resolved/missing/unresolved heading/block/footnote/embed cases.

title: GraphRAG derived indexes and evidence-backed candidate strategy
description:
GraphRAG phase after the first-order GraphIndex is stable. This supersedes the older assumption that strategy must avoid derived graph caches.

First-order GraphIndex remains the precise source of Obsidian metadata facts and does not persist. GraphRAG may maintain XDG-state derived indexes because conversation-time candidate discovery needs bounded reachability, path evidence, coverage deltas, structural gaps, and index freshness without recomputing the whole vault on every prompt.

Boundaries:
- Every candidate must link back to first-order GraphIndex evidence.
- Derived indexes can be stale, partial, rebuilding, or failed; status must be visible.
- Candidate ranking may use reachability and coverage changes, but scores must be decomposable into evidence fields.
- No candidate writes to vault automatically.
- No candidate enters OpenCode context automatically.
- Full-text embedding and generated knowledge graphs are out of this phase.

Reference docs:
- docs/explorations/obsidian-opencode-product-positioning.md
- docs/explorations/graphrag-known-to-unknown.md

Success criteria:
- Child tasks define cache/status, bounded reachability/path evidence, context expansion what-if, structural gap detection, diagnostics, and read-only Bar/surface display.
- The phase consumes GraphIndex query APIs instead of parsing vault files or Obsidian links itself.
- UI and diagnostics expose evidence paths, freshness, and failure reasons.
acceptance_criteria:
- Depends on oc-htk.4 GraphIndex.
- Derived index cache key includes vault identity/path, graph snapshot version, plugin version, and algorithm version.
- Candidate APIs return evidence paths and decomposed fields, not opaque recommendations.
- Candidate display is read-only until the user explicitly adds context or edits vault content.
- Diagnostics never output note full text.

title: GraphRAG: define derived index cache and status model
description:
Define the second-order GraphRAG derived index cache and status model. The cache is not a truth source; it stores recomputable results derived from GraphIndex.

Scope:
- cache key: vault identity/path, graph snapshot version, plugin version, algorithm version.
- status: computed, stale, rebuilding, partial, failed.
- invalidation: graph version changes, plugin/algorithm version changes, vault path changes.
- storage: XDG state under the plugin runtime namespace.
- diagnostics: expose status, key, last build time, affected algorithms, and failure reason.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Design/implementation introduces a typed cache metadata model.
- Cache absence and stale cache are represented explicitly.
- Deleting cache is always safe; GraphIndex remains the truth source.
- No note full text is written to derived cache in this task.
- Tests cover fresh, stale, rebuilding/partial, failed, and version mismatch states.
- AGENTS or docs mention that GraphRAG cache is derived and disposable.

title: GraphRAG: compute bounded reachability and path evidence
description:
Compute bounded 1-3 hop reachability from GraphIndex facts and return path evidence suitable for review.

Scope:
- consume GraphIndex query API only.
- support seed path sets, not just a single active file.
- store or return paths with sourcePath, targetPath, intermediate nodes, reference positions, heading/block subpath evidence when available.
- expose algorithm status through the derived index status model.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Depth is capped at 3 and cannot accidentally run unbounded graph traversal.
- Results include path evidence, not only target node ids.
- Cycles are handled without treating conceptual cycles as errors.
- Tests cover single seed, multiple seeds, disconnected graph, cycle, unresolved references, and stale derived index status.
- No vault writes and no automatic context injection.
notes: Audit update 2026-06-12: bounded reachability is the fast path. Any slower local centrality metrics introduced later must be optional, skippable, and report metric status such as computed/approx/timeout/skipped. Bar baseline rendering must not wait on slow metrics.

title: GraphRAG: detect structural gaps from graph evidence
description:
Detect structural gaps that indicate possible missing relationships in the vault. This task surfaces candidates only; it does not create notes, links, or context items.

Candidate families:
- repeated unresolved linkpaths.
- shared sources or shared targets without a direct link.
- alias drift or conflicting display text where GraphIndex can expose it.
- cross-root short paths with no bridge note.
- nodes repeatedly traversed by paths from different root segments.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Each candidate carries source evidence fields: paths, reference positions, counts, and direct-edge existence.
- Scores, if present, are decomposed into evidence fields such as sharedSourceCount, sharedTargetCount, bridgePathCount, repeatedUnresolvedCount, aliasConflictCount.
- Directory/index pages can be flagged as possible artificial hubs without being hidden.
- Tests cover repeated unresolved, shared neighbor without direct edge, existing direct edge, and cross-root bridge samples.
- No candidate writes to vault or enters OpenCode context automatically.

title: GraphRAG: rank context expansion by reachability change
description:
Rank candidate vault notes for the current OpenCode session by graph reachability change. This is a what-if analysis over current context items, not an automatic context injector.

Inputs:
- current session ContextItem provenance.
- GraphIndex node/reference facts.
- bounded reachability/path evidence.

Ranking fields:
- newly reachable nodes.
- distance reductions for important targets.
- cross-root coverage added.
- common convergence across seed paths.
- whether the candidate is a broad hub/index page.

Acceptance Criteria:
- API returns candidate id/path, decomposed ranking fields, and evidence paths.
- The same candidate result can be rendered in UI and copied in diagnostics without note full text.
- Tests cover one seed, multiple seeds, hub penalty/flag, disconnected graph, and stale derived index.
- Adding a candidate to context remains a separate explicit user action.
- No vault writes.
notes: Audit update 2026-06-12: ranking fields must include metric status for any expensive or approximate signal. Slow metrics are allowed only as optional evidence factors; timeout/skipped/approx states must degrade gracefully and must not block Bar or current context rendering.

title: GraphRAG derived diagnostics and harness report
description:
Add diagnostics and harness reporting for GraphRAG derived indexes. This task covers the observability gap between GraphIndex diagnostics and read-only candidate display.

Scope:
- Report derived cache key, graph snapshot version, plugin version, algorithm version, last computed time.
- Report per-algorithm status: computed, stale, rebuilding, partial, failed, skipped, timeout, approximate when applicable.
- Report which candidate families are affected by stale/partial/failed algorithms.
- Include compact candidate evidence samples and decomposed ranking fields.
- Do not output note full text.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Harness or formatter can show derived index status without opening Obsidian Graph View.
- Stale, partial, failed, skipped/timeout states are test covered.
- Candidate diagnostics include evidence paths and decomposed fields.
- Report output never includes note full text or full conversation text.
- Read-only GraphRAG surface can consume the same status shape.

title: Define product shape for context navigation and graph-aware Obsidian integration
description:
先定义产品形态，再进入 ContextItemNavigator、左侧 bar、图谱机制等实现任务。

产品问题：OpenCode 嵌入 Obsidian 后，用户需要理解和控制“当前 OpenCode session 正在被哪些 Obsidian 内容影响”，并能从 session context 回到 vault 中已有内容。

下一阶段要先收敛产品形态，而不是先决定某个类、某个 bar 或某个 graph source。候选方向至少包括：
1. 当前 session 上下文面板：看见、移除、跳回来源、理解失败。
2. 从 vault 出发的“发送到当前 OpenCode session”动作：选区、当前笔记、标题或块由用户显式发送。
3. 基于当前笔记的相关内容候选区：反向链接、出链、当前光标附近标题等只作为候选，用户确认后才进入 session。

Obsidian link graph 第一阶段只作为候选和导航证据。它不先承担多跳自动注入、全 vault 排序、图算法推荐或语义检索。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 给出 2-3 个产品形态候选，并说明每个候选的主用户动作、入口位置、失败显示、非目标。
- 明确推荐的下一阶段主形态，以及该推荐不成立的条件。
- 明确 context bar 在产品中是状态索引、导航入口、诊断入口、控制面板，还是它们的组合。
- 明确 Obsidian link graph 在第一阶段只用于哪些用户可见能力。
- 明确候选内容和已经进入 session 的内容必须分层展示。
- 明确删除语义是“从当前 session 上下文移除”，不能暗示历史回答被撤回。
- 保持机制和策略分离：机制层只解析 Obsidian 已有链接事实；策略层才决定是否把邻居、入链、出链、broken reference 变成 context 或建议。
- 不要求先实现 ContextItemNavigator、UI bar 或 graph source；实现 beads 等产品形态收敛后再执行。
close_reason: Product shape settled: the Obsidian-native context bar is the first product surface, a lightweight status and control surface for current OpenCode session context; implementation beads now carry the work.

title: Preserve context provenance after session restore
description:
产品风险：重启后恢复出来的 context item 如果只显示 Restored context / OpenCode session，用户知道 session 里有上下文，却不知道来自哪个 vault 文件、哪段内容。这样会破坏“当前 session 输入可追溯”的产品主线。

这个问题先作为产品/机制风险登记，不要求立即实现。它依赖 oc-htk.6 的产品形态收敛。

## Steps to Reproduce
1. 向当前 OpenCode session 添加来自 vault 文件或选区的 context。
2. 重启或重载 Obsidian 插件，让 ContextSyncer 从 OpenCode messages 恢复 context item。
3. 观察恢复后的条目是否仍能显示原 vault 来源、行号和可审查状态。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 明确恢复后的 context item 必须保留或重建可审查来源。
- 如果无法恢复 vault 来源，UI 必须把它显示为来源不可确认，而不是假装可追溯。
- 删除语义仍然作用于当前 OpenCode session 的 message/part，不暗示删除 vault 文件或历史回答。
- 后续实现任务必须说明 provenance 写入、恢复和 diagnostics 的单一真相源。
notes: Audit cleanup 2026-06-12: this bead is the risk record for restored context provenance. The implementation gate is oc-htk.7.1. Downstream implementation/display tasks should depend on oc-htk.7.1 rather than this risk record directly.

title: Persist and restore context provenance as a single truth source
description:
Implement or freeze the contract for writing, restoring, and reporting ContextItem provenance. The product surface must not show restored context as vault-backed unless the source can be trusted or reconstructed.

Scope:
- Decide the single truth source for context provenance metadata associated with OpenCode messageId/partId.
- Persist enough metadata to restore sourcePath, range, type, label, textLength, messageId, partId, createdAt, and provenanceStatus.
- Represent uncertain/unavailable provenance explicitly.
- Keep deletion semantics tied to OpenCode message/part ignore, not vault content.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Restored context with known provenance shows source path/range/type/textLength and can use safe navigation.
- Restored context without trusted source is displayed as provenanceStatus=uncertain or equivalent.
- Diagnostics include provenance status and omit full context text.
- Tests cover fresh manual context, restored known context, restored uncertain context, and ignored part.
- Context surface and discussion provenance tasks can consume this contract without inventing another provenance model.
close_reason: Completed: context provenance is written into OpenCode context messages, restored as known or uncertain, surfaced in diagnostics without copying full text, and covered by focused syncer/client tests.

title: Context surface rows should be compact clickable cells
description:
Context surface row should behave like a compact Obsidian-native cell. Single click opens the source through ContextItemNavigator. Double click toggles whether the row is selected or dimmed for future context control semantics. Remove the dedicated Open source button from the first-stage surface. Keep destructive or remote-changing actions explicit and visually secondary.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Row click calls ContextItemNavigator and reports resolved/unresolved result.
- Double click only changes local row selection or dim state; it does not mutate OpenCode session or vault content.
- Missing path, folder path, synthetic source, uncertain provenance, and unresolved subpath still never create files.
- The dedicated Open source button is removed from the first-stage surface.
- UI is compact, uses Obsidian interface font density, and does not render as oversized cards.
- Remove from session remains explicit and visually secondary until a fuller context panel exists.
close_reason: Implemented compact ContextStatusBar rows. Single click schedules safe navigation through ContextItemNavigator/openItem, double click cancels navigation and toggles local dim/selected state with aria-pressed, the Open source button is removed, and Remove from session remains explicit. Covered by tests/context/ContextStatusBar.test.ts plus bun run check.

title: 新建 ContextRegistry：事件驱动的单一状态源
description:
新建 src/context/ContextRegistry.ts。继承 Node events 模块的 EventEmitter，作为上下文条目的唯一状态持有者。

来自 spec: docs/plans/context-management.md#CM-03

## 改后预期结构
```
src/context/ContextRegistry.ts
  extends EventEmitter
  - items: ContextItem[]
  - MAX_ITEMS = 50
  + add(item) → ContextItem | null       // emit 'context:added'
  + remove(id) → boolean                 // emit 'context:removed'
  + removeBySourceKey(key) → boolean     // 供自动源 diff
  + getItems() → ContextItem[]
  + restoreItems(items) → void           // emit 'context:restored'（非 added）
```

## 职责
- 唯一状态源：不调 OpenCodeClient，不碰 DOM，不 import 业务模块
- add 超限时返回 null，不 emit
- remove 不存在时返回 false，不 emit
- restoreItems 只 emit 'context:restored'，不触发 syncer 重复创建

## 最小接口约束
- import: 仅允许 EventEmitter from 'events'
- 禁止 import: OpenCodeClient / obsidian / proxy
- 事件名冻结: context:added / context:removed / context:restored
- 事件 payload: added{ item }, removed{ item }, restored{ items }
- 下游不得新增事件名、不得改 payload shape

## Acceptance Criteria
- bun run build 零错误
- grep -E 'import.*(OpenCodeClient|obsidian|proxy)' src/context/ContextRegistry.ts 零命中
- add → emit added → 监听方可收到 item
- add 超过 50 → 返回 null
- remove 不存在 → 返回 false，不 emit
- restoreItems → emit restored（非 added）
acceptance_criteria: build clean; zero business imports; event emit/receive verified; cap at 50; remove nonexistent returns false; restoreItems emits restored only
close_reason: spec 重写为最简桥接架构，旧 beads 作废

title: Expose Obsidian process environment in server diagnostics
description:
macOS GUI Obsidian can start opencode serve with a minimal launchd PATH, so local MCP commands may be missing even when the user's shell environment is correct. First stage is observability only: expose the Obsidian process PATH, launch mode, resolved executable, command, cwd, shell flag, and safe environment key summary through ServerManager diagnostics, XDG status, copy diagnostics, and harness/doctor. Do not automatically source shell profiles, do not guess zsh/bash/powershell files, and do not fallback between launch strategies at runtime.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Server diagnostics include process PATH and launch environment summary without leaking secret values.
- Path mode reports resolved executable and executable lookup failure with PATH evidence.
- Custom command mode reports shell=true and raw command while keeping responsibility explicit.
- Harness status/doctor summarizes PATH and executable resolution from the same diagnostics shape.
- UI/copy diagnostics reuse the same formatter.
- Tests cover minimal GUI PATH, custom command shell mode, and secret redaction.
- AGENTS.md records that environment strategy is explicit configuration, not automatic shell profile sourcing.
close_reason: Environment diagnostics are exposed through ServerManager, XDG status, copy diagnostics, and harness without shell profile sourcing or launch fallback
